ValidationRule.description: Prevents users from setting a Close Date in the past for opportunities that are not yet closed (Closed Won or Closed Lost).
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( CloseDate < TODAY(), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Won")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Lost")) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Close Date must be today or in the future for open opportunities.
